understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the available selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; a level only reports WIN when all '+' tiles are covered simultaneously.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A turn consists of issuing a CLICK on a target grid coordinate. The engine applies that click to the currently selected piece (and/or selects a piece if applicable) and attempts to move it to the clicked position according to the level’s movement rules; if the destination or route is obstructed by walls/obstacles or the move is otherwise invalid, the piece does not move and the step is still consumed. Movement is constrained by blocking tiles (walls/obstacles) and possibly by other pieces, so repeated clicks on blocked targets produce 'did not change position' results.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the available selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; a level only reports WIN when all '+' tiles are covered simultaneously.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A turn consists of issuing a CLICK on a target grid coordinate. The engine applies that click to the currently selected piece (and/or selects a piece if applicable) and attempts to move it to the clicked position according to the level’s movement rules; if the destination or route is obstructed by walls/obstacles or the move is otherwise invalid, the piece does not move and the step is still consumed. Movement is constrained by blocking tiles (walls/obstacles) and possibly by other pieces, so repeated clicks on blocked targets produce 'did not change position' results.
